name: Daisho Microline Holdings Limited
summary: Daisho Microline Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and trades in printed circuit boards. The company is also involved in the trading of petroleum and energy products, and related business; and vessel chartering and property holding activities. It has operations in the People's Republic of China, Hong Kong, Singapore, North America, Japan, Europe, and internationally. The company is headquartered in Chai Wan, Hong Kong.
